message: Node started: Identify and detail the formal technical correspondences between Quantum Darwinism and Holographic Quantum Error Correction. Specifically, investigate how the concept of information redundancy in the environment (Quantum Darwinism) maps to the encoding of bulk information in boundary degrees of freedom (Holographic QEC). Focus on the relationship between the emergence of classicality via many observers and the protection of logical information via entanglement entropy and subsystem properties.
